subcodes.first_line: O my God! This is a maidservant who hath arisen, facing the horizon of Thy mercy, seeking Thy pardon and forgiveness, imploring Thy grace and acceptance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی هذه امة قامت مستقبله افق رحمتک طالبه عفوک و مغفرتک سائله صفحک و توابیتک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for the departed
